# Sample Test Skill

A minimal skill used as a fixture in improvement-evaluator tests.

## When to Use
- Unit testing the evaluator pipeline

## When NOT to Use
- Production use

<example>
Run a test:
$ echo "hello world"
→ hello world
</example>

## CLI
echo "hello world"

## Output Artifacts
| Request | Deliverable |
|---------|------------|
| Test | stdout text |
